__comment__: XDataHub UI English localization (aligned with zh keys). Keep key set exactly in sync with locales/zh/xdatahub_ui.json.
xdatahub.ui.node.xloraget.info_desc1: Load order is top-to-bottom; trigger words in the second row can be toggled individually.
xdatahub.ui.node.xloraget.info_desc2: Adjusting Clip strength has no effect when Clip is not connected.
xdatahub.ui.node.xloraget.empty: Drag Lora cards from XDataHub here
xdatahub.ui.node.xloraget.trigger_refres: Refresh trigger words and notes from XDataHub
xdatahub.ui.node.xmediaget.placeholder_i: Drop an XDataHub image card here
xdatahub.ui.node.xmediaget.placeholder_v: Drop an XDataHub video card here
xdatahub.ui.node.xmediaget.placeholder_a: Drop an XDataHub audio card here
xdatahub.ui.node.xmediaget.placeholder_t: Drop an XDataHub text card here
xdatahub.ui.node.ximageget.mask_editor.b: Shift + Wheel adaptive, Ctrl/Cmd + Shift + Wheel fine
xdatahub.ui.node.ximageget.mask_editor.f: Color tolerance for flood fill (scroll wheel to adjust)
xdatahub.ui.node.ximageget.mask_editor.e: Uncheck to lock paint layer from eraser
Uncheck to lock mask layer from eraser
xdatahub.ui.node.ximageget.mask_editor.t: Flood fill region (samples all visible layers)
Move the canvas (middle mouse drag / Ctrl+left drag)
xdatahub.ui.node.ximageget.mask_editor.i: Invert image colors in masked areas (visual only)
xdatahub.ui.node.ximagecompare.wheel_ctr: When enabled, scrolling on the image area adjusts the slider parameter for the current mode.
xdatahub.ui.node.ximagecompare.slide_dir: Toggle slide direction between horizontal and vertical split
xdatahub.ui.node.ximagecompare.curve_sin: Smooth sine wave crossfade between A and B
xdatahub.ui.node.ximagecompare.curve_eas: Eased transitions with smoother start and end
xdatahub.ui.node.ximagecompare.curve_hol: Holds at A and B, with quick transitions between them
xdatahub.ui.node.ximagecompare.curve_lon: Extended holds at A and B with shorter transitions
xdatahub.ui.node.ximagecompare.live_prev: Show real-time preview from upstream sampler while running. Requires ComfyUI real-time preview to be enabled.
xdatahub.ui.node.xmemorycleanup.title: Manual Quick Cleanup
xdatahub.ui.node.xmemorycleanup.subtitle: Use these buttons manually when you want to free resources without running the workflow.
xdatahub.ui.node.xmemorycleanup.btn.mode: Clear Models + Workflow Node Result Cache
Clearing Models + Workflow Node Result Cache...
xdatahub.ui.node.xmemorycleanup.tip.mode: Unload all models that are currently kept ready in memory. They will load again when needed.
xdatahub.ui.node.xmemorycleanup.tip.exec: Clear node result cache saved after running a workflow. After clearing it, those nodes may need to recalculate next time the workflow runs.
xdatahub.ui.node.xmemorycleanup.tip.mode: Unload ready models and clear node result cache saved after running a workflow. Related nodes may need to recalculate next time the workflow runs.
xdatahub.ui.node.xmemorycleanup.status.e: Cleared {entries} workflow node result cache entries.
xdatahub.ui.node.xmemorycleanup.status.m: Cleared {models} loaded models and {entries} workflow node result cache entries.
xdatahub.ui.node.xpipe.refresh_port_stat: Refresh port names and types: Re-fetch port names and data types from connected upstream nodes
xdatahub.ui.node.xpipe_v2.control_refres: Refresh port names and data types from connected upstream nodes
xdatahub.ui.node.xlinker.title_sync_enab: Title sync enabled: Node title will auto-sync with note_text input field content
xdatahub.ui.node.xlinker.title_sync_disa: Title sync disabled: Click to enable auto-sync of node title with note_text input field content
xdatahub.ui.node.xlinker.port_sync_enabl: Port sync enabled: Input/output port names will auto-sync with note_text input field content
xdatahub.ui.node.xlinker.port_sync_disab: Port sync disabled: Click to enable auto-sync of input/output port names with note_text input field content
xdatahub.ui.node.xseed.tip_generate: Generate random seed based on digit limit
xdatahub.ui.node.xseed.tip_gen_random_ac: Random mode active, manual generation disabled
xdatahub.ui.node.xseed.tip_use_last: Copy last applied seed to current seed
xdatahub.ui.node.xcontrol.tip.control_ty: Select the visible controller: analog knob/fader, boolean toggle, hold button, or XY pad.
xdatahub.ui.node.xcontrol.tip.control_va: Current output value. Type a value and press Enter or blur the field to update the control.
xdatahub.ui.node.xcontrol.tip.value_mode: Choose how the normalized 0-1 control position is converted to the FLOAT output.
xdatahub.ui.node.xcontrol.tip.mode_range: Range maps the control continuously from Min to Max and can snap to Step.
xdatahub.ui.node.xcontrol.tip.mode_steps: Steps snaps the control to one value from the JSON array.
xdatahub.ui.node.xcontrol.tip.mode_perce: Percentage outputs Base multiplied by a percentage offset between Min% and Max%.
xdatahub.ui.node.xcontrol.tip.range_min: Lowest FLOAT output in Range mode.
xdatahub.ui.node.xcontrol.tip.range_max: Highest FLOAT output in Range mode.
xdatahub.ui.node.xcontrol.tip.range_step: Snap size for Range mode and hold-button increments. Use 0 to disable snapping.
xdatahub.ui.node.xcontrol.tip.range_defa: Default Range value used as the intended reset/start value.
xdatahub.ui.node.xcontrol.tip.steps_valu: JSON array of discrete FLOAT outputs, for example [0, 0.25, 0.5, 1].
xdatahub.ui.node.xcontrol.tip.steps_inde: Default step index, starting at 0. The button moves one index per repeat.
xdatahub.ui.node.xcontrol.tip.percentage: Base value used before applying the percentage offset.
Minimum percentage offset. Negative values reduce the base value.
Maximum percentage offset. Positive values increase the base value.
Default percentage offset used as the intended reset/start value.
xdatahub.ui.node.xcontrol.tip.shape: Visual shape for knobs, or handle shape for horizontal/vertical faders.
xdatahub.ui.node.xcontrol.tip.toggle_sty: Visual style of the boolean toggle. It changes BOOLEAN and outputs 0 or 1 on FLOAT.
xdatahub.ui.node.xcontrol.tip.default_st: Default boolean state for Toggle when the node is created or restored without a saved state.
xdatahub.ui.node.xcontrol.tip.button_mod: Increase/Decrease change while held. Toggle switches between low and high values on click.
xdatahub.ui.node.xcontrol.tip.button_sty: Visual shape of the hold button. The button also reports pressed state on BOOLEAN.
xdatahub.ui.node.xcontrol.tip.x_min: Lowest X output value for the XY pad.
xdatahub.ui.node.xcontrol.tip.x_max: Highest X output value for the XY pad.
xdatahub.ui.node.xcontrol.tip.x_step: Snap size for X output. Use 0 to disable X snapping.
xdatahub.ui.node.xcontrol.tip.x_default: Default X value applied when switching to XY Pad or editing this field.
xdatahub.ui.node.xcontrol.tip.y_min: Lowest Y output value for the XY pad.
xdatahub.ui.node.xcontrol.tip.y_max: Highest Y output value for the XY pad.
xdatahub.ui.node.xcontrol.tip.y_step: Snap size for Y output. Use 0 to disable Y snapping.
xdatahub.ui.node.xcontrol.tip.y_default: Default Y value applied when switching to XY Pad or editing this field.
xdatahub.ui.node.xcontrol.tip.crosshair: Show guide lines through the current XY point.
xdatahub.ui.node.xcontrol.tip.grid: Show a subtle grid behind the XY pad for easier positioning.
xdatahub.ui.node.xcontrolpanel.title: Control Panel
xdatahub.ui.node.xcontrolpanel.subtitle: Run immediate control actions without queueing the workflow.
xdatahub.ui.node.xcontrolpanel.tip.resta: Restart the ComfyUI server process. Refresh the browser after it comes back.
xdatahub.ui.node.xcontrolpanel.confirm.r: Restart ComfyUI now? Running work may be interrupted.
xdatahub.ui.node.xcontrolpanel.status.re: Restart scheduled. Refresh the browser after ComfyUI is back.
xdatahub.ui.node.xanytostring.label: Result
xdatahub.ui.node.xanytostring.placeholde: String output will appear here after execution
